research_boundary: Research use only. Not for diagnosis, treatment, cure claims, prescribing, clinical deployment, regulatory compliance, or drug-safety certification.

trigger_inputs.safety_conclusion: hERG IC50 > 30 uM; molecule does not inhibit hERG; cardiac safety conclusion follows

note: Triggers hERG_only_overreach: safety_conclusion drawn from hERG IC50 alone without multi-current framing (ICaL, INaL). A high hERG IC50 does not constitute a complete cardiac safety assessment. Multi-current context is required.
